reviews.review_title: I’m the only review on this game, oml…
reviews.review_description: So the games guns are cool, but uh sadly the right upper storage for your guns lets your guns disappear. The option for the black circle when you turn isn’t there (forget what it’s called though.) so there’s no option you’re just permanently stuck with an option that you don’t want. The guns feel really horrible. They don’t feel satisfying. I like the style though, only reason why I got this game is for nostalgia not even worth it to be honest, but it was really fun. I guess??? Hopefully I’m gonna try to return it. if it doesn’t work I’ll be sad, oh my God. Never thought I’d ever even write review on a game but holy my Lord.￼
